import io
import string

fn hashes(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut s = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < n
    s = "#{s}#"
    k = k + 1
  end
  s
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut c0 = 0
  mut c1 = 0
  mut c2 = 0
  mut c3 = 0
  mut c4 = 0
  mut c5 = 0
  mut c6 = 0
  mut c7 = 0
  mut c8 = 0
  mut c9 = 0

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      -1
    end
    if b == 48
      c0 = c0 + 1
    else if b == 49
      c1 = c1 + 1
    else if b == 50
      c2 = c2 + 1
    else if b == 51
      c3 = c3 + 1
    else if b == 52
      c4 = c4 + 1
    else if b == 53
      c5 = c5 + 1
    else if b == 54
      c6 = c6 + 1
    else if b == 55
      c7 = c7 + 1
    else if b == 56
      c8 = c8 + 1
    else if b == 57
      c9 = c9 + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println("0: #{hashes(c0)}")
  println("1: #{hashes(c1)}")
  println("2: #{hashes(c2)}")
  println("3: #{hashes(c3)}")
  println("4: #{hashes(c4)}")
  println("5: #{hashes(c5)}")
  println("6: #{hashes(c6)}")
  println("7: #{hashes(c7)}")
  println("8: #{hashes(c8)}")
  println("9: #{hashes(c9)}")
end
